meta.tagline: Technology leadership that turns complexity into decisions and delivery
meta.description: Bin Askar Technology is a Riyadh-based technology advisory and leadership practice helping organizations and digital products make clearer decisions and build for growth.

hero.title: Clearer technology decisions. Stronger digital products.
hero.subtitle: We lead strategy, architecture, and delivery when technology becomes a critical business decision — not just another software project.

brief.label: Engagement brief
brief.title: Turn complexity into a path your team can execute and own.

items.direction: Technology direction tied to business goals
items.architecture: Architecture designed for reality and growth

services.title: Technology leadership at moments of change.
services.subtitle: We do not sell a list of technologies. We choose the intervention that removes the nearest obstacle between your decision and the outcome.

cto.title: CTO as a Service
cto.description: Executive technology leadership when the role is missing, or during a growth stage that needs independent judgment and clearer governance for teams and delivery.

strategy.title: Strategy & Digital Transformation
strategy.description: Turn competing priorities into a practical roadmap, ordered by business impact, risk, and the organization’s ability to execute.

architecture.title: Solution Architecture
architecture.description: Design scalable platforms and integrations, with documented decisions that balance quality, speed, and operating cost.

ai.title: Applied AI
ai.description: Move AI use cases from demo to production through model selection, RAG and agents, evaluation, governance, and quality controls.

product.title: Digital Product Engineering
product.description: Establish a product from discovery to launch, or recover a stalled one with clearer scope, fit-for-purpose architecture, and a dependable delivery rhythm.

methodology.title: From ambiguity to internal capability.
methodology.subtitle: Every stage ends with a decision or asset your team can use — not a presentation that lives on its own.

discover.title: Understand
discover.description: We unpack the business context, decision makers, current system, and real constraints before proposing a solution.

design.title: Decide
design.description: We turn options into decisions: architecture, priorities, scope, and success criteria understood by everyone.

build.title: Deliver
build.description: We build in verifiable increments, with clear engineering standards and continuous transparency around risk and progress.

scale.title: Enable
scale.description: We stabilize operations and observability, then transfer knowledge and ownership so the team continues with confidence.

experience.title: When adding developers is not enough.
experience.subtitle: We engage when the problem sits in the decision, architecture, or delivery model — and someone needs to connect all three to business goals.

direction.title: Technology investment lacks one direction
direction.description: Many initiatives, but no shared priority or roadmap connecting them to a business result.

delivery.title: An important product is stalled in delivery
delivery.description: Constant scope changes, a business-technology gap, or releases that cannot be predicted.

architecture.title: The platform has outgrown its architecture
architecture.description: Complexity, operating cost, and change risk rise as users and integrations grow.

ai.title: An AI opportunity has no safe path to production
ai.description: Promising prototypes still need a clear use case, evaluation, governance, and operations.

caseStudies.title: Real products. Real decisions.
caseStudies.subtitle: Examples of products where technology leadership was directly involved — from business model to architecture and delivery.

minnha.title: Minnha — منحة
minnha.description: Repositioning a digital product from a donations model to university admissions and scholarship services, while building the technology path that enabled the shift.

outcomes.three: Product alignment with the new business model

hido.title: Hido — هايدو
hido.description: A product connecting visitors with authentic experiences hosted by local communities, bringing booking, discovery, and maps into one journey.

outcomes.three: Cloud architecture designed for product growth

leader.title: The decision stays close to delivery.
leader.name: Abdullah Bin Askar
leader.bio: A technology leader with more than a decade across enterprise solutions and digital products in telecom, government, and startups. He combines the perspective of a CTO with hands-on engineering, from team design and governance to architecture and launch.
leader.quote: The best technology decision is not the most complex. It is the clearest for the team and the closest to measurable impact.

cta.title: A critical technology decision should not stay ambiguous.
cta.subtitle: Share the context, what your team is trying to achieve, and where progress stops today.

contact.title: Tell us where the path is blocked.
contact.subtitle: A focused first conversation to understand the challenge and determine whether we are the right partner.
contact.expectation: We review the context carefully and reply with a clear next step — not a generic sales pitch.

form.name: Name
form.message: What decision or challenge are you working through?
form.success: We received your message. We will review the context and get back to you soon.
form.error: We could not send the message. Please try again or use the email address.

validation.messageMin: Message must be at least 10 characters

about.title: An independent technology practice. An owner’s mindset.
about.intro: Bin Askar Technology is a Riyadh-based technology advisory and leadership practice. We work closely with decision makers and teams, and stay close to delivery until direction becomes reality.

mission.title: The central idea
mission.description: Reduce the distance between an executive decision and engineering reality: clarify what should be built, why, and in what order — then help the team deliver and own it.

enterprise.title: Enterprises & large organizations
enterprise.description: When legacy systems, integrations, and governance meet a genuine need for change.

startups.title: Founders & startups
startups.description: When a product needs mature technology leadership before or while building the internal team.

government.title: Public-sector programs
government.description: When service quality, reliability, and delivery clarity are requirements, not enhancements.

clarity.title: Start with clarity
clarity.description: Name the problem as it is and separate assumptions from facts before they become cost.

craft.title: Build with care
craft.description: Quality is a daily decision in architecture, code, and operations — not a final phase.

partnership.title: Transfer ownership
partnership.description: Work with the team, document decisions, and transfer knowledge so the impact remains after the engagement.

collect.title: Data We Collect
collect.content: We only collect data you provide through the contact form: name, email, company name (optional), and message text.

use.title: How We Use Your Data
use.content: We use your data solely to respond to your inquiries. We do not sell or share your data with third parties for marketing purposes.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: We may use essential cookies to improve browsing experience. We do not use advertising trackers.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: For any privacy inquiries, use the contact form on this website.
